content.name: plnt
content.descr_2: Plant the {plant} in the {location}. You will need assistance with preparing the soil and placing the flowers evenly.
content.descr_3: Plant the {plant} in the {location}. Your teammate must be especially willing to work despite being surrounded by bees. They should also be reliable enough to handle the seedlings carefully and avoid damaging them.
content.o_succ: {name} successfully assisted you in planting the {plant} in the {location}.
content.o_comp: {name} couldn't help you because they are not familiar with this type of plant.
content.o_reli: {name} made a mistake and damaged the seedlings.
content.o_will: {name} was scared by the bees surrounding the plants and gave up.

content.name: chop
content.descr_1: Gather {wood} wood by chopping down surrounding trees using the {tool}.
content.descr_2: Gather {wood} wood by chopping down surrounding trees using the {tool}. You will need assistance in planning the best cuts with the {tool}.
content.descr_3: Gather {wood} wood by chopping down surrounding trees using the {tool}. Your teammate must be especially reliable to distinguish the {wood} trees from other trees. They should also be willing enough to work despite the presence of poison ivy.
content.o_succ: {name} successfully assisted you in gathering enough {wood} wood.
content.o_comp: {name} couldn't help you because they aren't trained to handle the {tool}.
content.o_reli: {name} made a mistake and chopped down the wrong tree.
content.o_will: {name} was overwhelmed by the itchiness from the poison ivy and gave up.

content.name: roof
content.descr_1: Fix the leaks in the roof of the {place}.
content.descr_2: Fix the leaks in the roof of the {place}. You will need assistance with the ladder to climb the room.
content.descr_3: Fix the leaks in the roof of the {place}. Your teammate must be especially willing to stay on the roof despite the strong wind. They should also be capable enough to detect the cause of the leaks.
content.o_succ: {name} successfully assisted you in fix all the leaks in the {place}'s roof.
content.o_comp: {name} couldn't help you because they aren't trained to assess roof damage.
content.o_reli: {name} made a mistake and failed to notice one of the leaks in the {place}'s roof.
content.o_will: {name} was overwhelmed by the strong wind on the roof gave up.

content.name: feed
content.descr_1: Feed all the {animal} in the barn.
content.descr_2: Feed all the {animal} in the barn. You will need assistance with spreading the fodder and monitoring the animals.
content.descr_3: Feed all the {animal} in the barn. Your teammate must be especially reliable to monitor all {animal} to ensure none of them run off the barn. They should also be capable enough to work closely with the animals without having an allergic reaction.
content.o_succ: {name} successfully assisted you in feeding all the {animal} in the barn.
content.o_comp: {name} couldn't help you because they are allergic to {animal}.
content.o_reli: {name} made a mistake and let one of the {animal} to run off the barn.
content.o_will: {name} was overwhelmed by the bad smell in the barn and gave up.

content.name: harv
content.descr_2: Harvest {fruit} from the orchard. You will need assistance in picking the ripe fruits and packing them into crates for transportation.
content.descr_3: Harvest {fruit} from the orchard. Your teammate must be especially capable of reaching the highest branches on the trees. They should also be willing enough to keep working despite the heavy rain.
content.o_succ: {name} successfully assisted you in harvesting all the {fruit} from the orchard.
content.o_comp: {name} couldn't help you because they aren't tall enough to reach the {fruit} on high branches.
content.o_reli: {name} made a mistake and damaged a tree.
content.o_will: {name} was bothered by the rain and gave up.

content.name: move
content.descr_1: Pick up the {object} from the storage area and carry them to the {destination}.
content.descr_2: Pick up the {object} from the storage area and carry them to the {destination}. You will need assistance in moving everything in as few trips as possible.
content.descr_3: Pick up the {object} from the storage area and carry them to the {destination}. Your teammate must be especially capable of lifting large and heavy objects. They should also be reliable enough to avoid damaging the {object} during transport.
content.o_succ: {name} successfully assisted you in moving the {object} to the {destination}.
content.o_comp: {name} couldn't help you because they can't lift object that large.
content.o_reli: {name} made a mistake and damaged some of the {object} during transport.
content.o_will: {name} was bothered by the mud outside the {destination} and gave up.
